# WealthMaze - AI Search & Agent Information

Welcome to WealthMaze, a premium personal finance web platform providing interactive, browser-safe, and lightning-fast calculators for mutual fund SIPs, loan EMIs, tax regimes, retirement planners, precious metals, and stocks.

## Site Details
- **Base Domain:** https://wealthmaze.in
- **Email Support:** support@wealthmaze.in
- **Core Technology:** Next.js (Static Pre-rendering), Tailwind CSS, Recharts.
- **Privacy Policy:** No user data is stored, calculated inputs are run locally via javascript.

## Important URLs for AI Retrievers

### Core Platform Pages
- `/` - Home Page & Directory of all calculators
- `/blog` - Personal Finance Hub & Educational guides archive
- `/resources` - Backlink directory and downloadable resource calculators
- `/about` - About us
- `/contact` - Reach out to the support team
- `/privacy` - Legally compliant cookie policies & Google AdSense terms
- `/terms` - Platform terms of service
- `/disclaimer` - Financial disclaimer (not financial advice)

### Major Calculators
- `/sip-calculator` - Mutual Fund systematic investment planner
- `/sip-comparison-calculator` - Side-by-side SIP scenario comparison
- `/emi-calculator` - Loan monthly payment and amortization tracker
- `/loan-comparison-calculator` - Compare two home/auto loan offers
- `/loan-prepayment-calculator` - Calculate prepayments and interest savings
- `/income-tax-calculator` - Compare Old vs New tax regimes in India
- `/retirement-calculator` - Plan early retirement wealth corpuses
- `/fire-calculator` - Financial Independence Retire Early milestone planner
- `/net-worth-calculator` - Private assets vs liabilities scorecard

### Programmatic Slabs (High-intent targets)
- `/sip-calculator-1000-per-month` - Calculate returns for ₹1,000 monthly SIP
- `/sip-calculator-5000-per-month` - Calculate returns for ₹5,000 monthly SIP
- `/home-loan-emi-calculator` - Specialized home loan payment slab
- `/car-loan-emi-calculator` - Specialized car loan payment slab

## Content Summary
All calculators are pre-rendered statically during build-time. We also maintain 33 original articles on budgeting rules, index funds, inflation adjustments, and evolutionary tax history.
